meaning: n.运货马车的车夫,电车的车长
examples: Carman Kass looked girlie in a black ruffle chiffon dress.
She was afraid of the trauma her mother's rejection of Carman might cause the little girl.
Fortunately for George Carman, Mr Al Fayed's formidable defence counsel, there were other witnesses to call upon.
George Carman hung up his wig earlier this year suffering from prostate cancer.
